sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Best Buy Announces Chief Executive Officer Succession Plans
feed.summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. announced that Jason Bonfig will succeed Corie Barry as Chief Executive Officer, effective at the end of Q3 on October 31st. Bonfig, currently the Chief Customer, Product and Fulfillment Officer, will also join the Board of Directors at that time. Barry will remain as a strategic advisor for six months after stepping down.

feed.title: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd Has $60.64 Million Stock Position in Teradyne, Inc. $TER
feed.summary: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd reduced its stake in Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) by 22.5% during the fourth quarter, now holding 313,282 shares valued at $60.64 million, making it their 16th largest holding. The article also details other institutional investor activity, Teradyne's positive Q4 2025 earnings results, recent strategic acquisitions, and price targets from various analysts. The company's stock shows strong performance but is noted for an elevated valuation and volatility.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Expected to Announce Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International (MGM) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $0.57 and revenue of $4.377 billion. This follows a strong prior quarter where MGM beat expectations significantly, reporting $1.60 EPS against $0.64 expected, leading analysts to project roughly $2 EPS for the current fiscal year and $3 for the next. Insider activity shows IAC increasing its stake while a director sold shares, with institutional investors holding approximately 68.1% of the stock.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS Stock Holdings Increased by OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd
feed.summary: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd significantly increased its stake in The Goldman Sachs Group by 11.9% in the fourth quarter, now owning 16,916 shares worth $14.865 million. Goldman Sachs (GS) reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $4.50 per share. Institutional ownership stands at 71.21%, with recent insider sales also noted.

feed.title: Philip Morris (NYSE: PM) Q1 2026 results: smoke-free growth, EPS guidance raised
feed.summary: Philip Morris International reported strong Q1 2026 results, driven by significant growth in its smoke-free product portfolio, with net revenues up 9.1% to $10.1 billion and adjusted diluted EPS climbing 16.0% to $1.96. The company raised its full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance to $8.36–$8.51, representing 10.9–12.9% growth over 2025. Despite strong international performance, the U.S. segment faced challenges, with declining revenues and ZYN shipment volumes due to inventory normalization and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) Q1 2026 sales climb 13% as guidance raised
feed.summary: Wabtec

feed.title: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd Reduces Position in Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd reduced its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 15.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 3,649 shares and holding 20,321 shares valued at $9.545 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors like Stanley Laman Group Ltd., Empirical Asset Management LLC, Strategic Advisors LLC, Ninety One UK Ltd, and Principal Financial Group Inc. increased their positions in Synopsys. The semiconductor company's stock trades at $467.58, with a market cap of $89.57 billion, and has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $531.00.

feed.title: Jason Bonfig to replace Corie Barry as Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) CEO
feed.summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. announced that Jason Bonfig will succeed Corie Barry as CEO and join the Board, effective November 1, 2026. Barry will step down on October 31, 2026, and transition to a strategic advisor role for six months. Bonfig's compensation package includes a $1,250,000 annual base salary and significant incentive targets, reflecting a planned internal CEO succession.

feed.title: MGM Resorts: Potential Upside From Osaka Expansion (NYSE:MGM)
feed.summary: MGM Resorts, a dominant force in Las Vegas with integrated gaming resorts across multiple regions, is poised for significant growth through its Osaka expansion. The MGM Osaka property is projected to become the primary EBITDA driver for the company, with the potential to generate $4 billion in annual adjusted EBITDA, making it the highest globally among integrated resorts. The author, a specialist in Asian equities, highlights the importance of this venture for MGM's future.

feed.title: Masco (NYSE: MAS) lifts Q1 profit and affirms 2026 EPS view
feed.summary: Masco Corporation reported a strong first quarter for 2026, with net sales increasing 6% to $1,918 million and adjusted earnings per share growing 20% to $1.04. The company also returned $267 million to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases. Despite a dynamic environment, Masco reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $4.10–$4.30.

feed.title: Ecolab Unleashes Water Intelligence to Drive Growth in the AI Era
feed.summary: Ecolab has launched Water Navigator IQ™, an AI-enabled platform designed to provide businesses with enterprise-wide water performance insights. This new tool helps optimize water usage, benchmark performance, and align decisions with business outcomes, addressing the rapidly increasing demand for water in the AI era. Ecolab emphasizes that efficient water management is crucial for operational excellence, growth, and resilience, especially as global water scarcity intensifies.

feed.title: How John Deere Beat the Great Depression With the Model A and B
feed.summary: During the Great Depression, John Deere faced plummeting sales and fierce competition. To overcome this, the company's leadership created a committee to design innovative tractors. The resulting Model A and B, featuring numerous advancements, not only surpassed competitors but also transformed John Deere from an implement company into a full-line equipment manufacturer.

feed.title: New lab test helps doctors identify ovarian cancer patients for KEYTRUDA
feed.summary: Labcorp has announced the nationwide availability of Agilent's FDA-approved PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx, a companion diagnostic for identifying platinum-resistant ovarian cancer patients eligible for Merck's KEYTRUDA therapies. This diagnostic helps clinicians identify patients who may benefit from these new treatment options because approximately 80% of ovarian cancer patients experience recurrence and resistance to platinum-based chemotherapy. Labcorp's participation in Agilent's Early Validation Program ensured a rapid rollout of this critical diagnostic test.

feed.title: Labcorp Launches FDA-Approved Companion Diagnostic to Identify Patients with Ovarian Cancer Eligible for KEYTRUDA®
feed.summary: Labcorp has made Agilent Technologies' PD-L1 IHC 22C3 pharmDx, an FDA-approved companion diagnostic, available nationwide. This diagnostic identifies patients with platinum-resistant ovarian cancer who are eligible for treatment with Merck's KEYTRUDA® or KEYTRUDA QLEX™. The initiative aims to provide critical access to new treatment options for patients with this challenging form of cancer, following rapid readiness activities by Labcorp.

feed.title: KeyCorp's UK deal opens transatlantic M&A access for clients
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) is acquiring Clearwater Corporate Finance LLP (Clearwater UK), a move that will expand Key's middle-market M&A advisory capabilities into Western Europe. This acquisition builds on a 2020 collaboration and aims to connect US clients with European acquisition targets and provide European clients access to the US M&A market. The deal is expected to close in the second half of 2026, pending UK regulatory approval.

feed.title: KeyCorp to Acquire Clearwater UK, Expanding Financial Advisory Capabilities
feed.summary: KeyCorp announced a definitive agreement to acquire Clearwater Corporate Finance LLP (Clearwater UK), a leading UK-based middle market investment banking advisory firm. This acquisition marks KeyCorp's strategic entry into the Western European market, enhancing its financial advisory services for institutional clients. The transaction builds on a 2020 collaboration agreement between KeyBanc Capital Markets Inc. and Clearwater, with the goal of strengthening M&A capabilities for both US and European clients.

feed.title: Complete responses put PureTech's LYT-200 deeper into blood cancer trials
feed.summary: PureTech announced positive topline data from its Phase 1b trial of LYT-200 for relapsed/refractory high-risk myelodysplastic syndrome (HR-MDS) and acute myeloid leukemia (AML), showing complete responses and favorable tolerability. The company plans to prioritize R/R HR-MDS for further development and engage with the FDA for a potential registration-supporting trial. LYT-200, an anti-galectin-9 monoclonal antibody, demonstrated robust antileukemic activity, including a 45.5% overall response rate in HR-MDS patients.

feed.title: Migdal Insurance & Financial Holdings Ltd. Takes Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Migdal Insurance & Financial Holdings Ltd. has acquired a new stake of 475,000 shares in Uber Technologies, Inc., valued at approximately $38.8 million, increasing institutional ownership to 80.24%. Uber's strategic moves include a significant stake and expanded robo-taxi fleet arrangements with Lucid, signaling a strong commitment to autonomous vehicles. Despite missing recent EPS estimates, Uber's revenue increased by 20.1% year-over-year, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $105.14.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Reports 2026 First-Quarter Results and Updates 2026 Full-Year Adjusted Diluted EPS Forecast for Currency Only;
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PMI) announced its 2026 first-quarter results, exceeding expectations with a 16.0% adjusted diluted EPS growth, driven by strong IQOS performance. Net revenues increased 9.1% to $10.1 billion, with smoke-free products accounting for 43% of total net revenues. The company updated its 2026 full-year adjusted diluted EPS forecast based on currency impacts, projecting an increase of 7.5% to 9.5% excluding currency.

feed.title: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd Reduces Stake in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET
feed.summary: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd decreased its holdings in Arista Networks, Inc. by 8.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 5,951 shares and retaining 60,620 shares valued at $7.96 million. Despite this reduction, many other institutional investors and hedge funds increased their stakes in ANET, with total institutional ownership standing at 82.47%. The article also notes mixed sentiment regarding Arista Networks, with positive analyst outlooks due to AI data-center spending and strong earnings, balanced against significant insider share sales.

feed.title: Moody’s (NYSE: MCO) Q1 2026 record results and raised 2026 EPS view
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) reported record first-quarter 2026 results, with total revenue rising 8% to $2.1 billion and Adjusted Diluted EPS increasing 13% to $4.33. The company also raised its full-year 2026 Adjusted Diluted EPS guidance to $16.40–$17.00 and increased planned share repurchases to approximately $2.5 billion, reflecting strong operating leverage and confidence in future cash generation.

feed.title: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd Sells 16,441 Shares of Welltower Inc. $WELL
feed.summary: OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING Corp Ltd reduced its stake in Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL) by 13.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 16,441 shares and holding 104,967 shares valued at $19.48 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the healthcare REIT. Welltower recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.74 per share.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Says Defense Spending Could Reach Cold War Era Levels
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman reported strong Q1 FY26 earnings and sales, exceeding analyst estimates, driven by modernization efforts and high demand in the defense sector. The company reiterated its FY26 guidance and highlighted a potential increase in defense spending to Cold War-era levels if the proposed $1.5 trillion FY27 defense budget is implemented. This budget prioritizes modernization with a significant increase over current spending, supporting major programs like B-21 and Sentinel.

feed.title: Geopolitics tends to create good buying opportunities, says Morgan Stanley's Andrew Slimmon
feed.summary: Andrew Slimmon, Senior Portfolio Manager at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, suggests that geopolitical events often present favorable buying opportunities in the market. He elaborated on this perspective during an appearance on 'Squawk Box,' where he also discussed current market trends, the implications of the Iran war, and his outlook on oil prices.

feed.title: Danaher Corp Files For Offering Of Four-Part Euro-Denominated Senior Notes, Size Not Disclosed - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Danaher Corp has filed an SEC filing for an offering of four-part Euro-denominated senior notes. The size of this offering has not been disclosed. This news comes from Reuters via TradingView.

feed.title: Jacobs Solutions Inc - Ghd, Wsp Appointed To Design Five Stations For Sydney Metro West
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc., in collaboration with GHD and WSP, has been appointed to design five stations for the Sydney Metro West project. This Reuters news brief, sourced from Refinitiv, indicates a significant role for these companies in a major infrastructure development.

feed.title: Yum! Brands (YUM) Projected to Post Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Yum! Brands (YUM) is expected to report its Q1 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts projecting $1.37 EPS and $2.0351 billion in revenue. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.75, and despite recent insider stock sales, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $174.50. Institutional investors own 82.37% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) is scheduled to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, April 29th. Analysts anticipate earnings of $0.16 per share and revenue of $2.3588 billion, aligned with company guidance. Despite beating EPS expectations in the prior quarter, the company faces near-term risks from high leverage, rising fuel costs, refinancing dynamics, and softer European demand, impacting its stock which currently trades near $19.31.

feed.title: Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) completes move from Delaware to Nevada
feed.summary: Datadog (DDOG) has officially redomiciled its corporate home from Delaware to Nevada following stockholder approval. This change, effective April 21, 2026, converted all existing Class A and Class B shares and equity awards to the Nevada entity without disrupting stock trading or certificates. While the company's business, management, assets, and liabilities remain unchanged, certain stockholder rights have been modified under the new Nevada charter and bylaws.

feed.title: PLDT, Smart advance inclusive cyber safety education for blind learners
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. and Smart Communications, Inc., in partnership with ATRIEV, conducted a three-day cyber safety workshop for 25 visually impaired women and girls at the Philippine National School for the Blind. This initiative, part of their IDEATe program, aimed to equip participants with knowledge about online risks like phishing and scams, and practical cyber hygiene strategies. The program emphasizes inclusive digital education to ensure underserved sectors can safely navigate the online world.

feed.title: Bullish on Pembina Pipeline Corp.
feed.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corp. (PPL-T) shows a bullish outlook, having broken out of a consolidation phase. The stock's previous advance from $38.79 to $60.72, supported by a rising trendline and its 40-week moving average (40WMA), suggests a new uptrend. While currently experiencing a modest pullback, this may offer a favorable entry point, with the bullish view weakening only if it falls below the 40WMA near $54-$55.

feed.title: Equifax Inc. (EFX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript Summary
feed.summary: This document is a summary of the Q1 2026 earnings call transcript for Equifax Inc. (EFX). It details the key financial performance and operational highlights discussed during the call for the period.

feed.title: Wabtec: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Wabtec (WAB) reported strong first-quarter earnings, with a profit of $362 million, or $2.12 per share, and adjusted earnings of $2.71 per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations of $2.55 per share. The company, a manufacturer of locomotive, subway, and bus parts, also recorded revenues of $2.95 billion for the period. Looking ahead, Wabtec anticipates full-year earnings between $10.25 and $10.65 per share, with revenues projected to be between $12.19 billion and $12.49 billion.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $9.10 and revenue of $3.4479 billion. Recent positive developments include successful Phase 3 trials for cemdisiran and expansion of Dupixent's label, alongside a dividend increase. The company's stock trades with a market cap of $79.01 billion and has an average analyst price target of $811.96, indicating a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Rail supplier Wabtec builds $30.8B backlog as sales jump 13%
feed.summary: Wabtec Corporation reported a strong start to 2026 with first-quarter sales hitting $2.95 billion, a 13% increase, and adjusted EPS up 19% to $2.71. The company's multi-year backlog swelled to $30.8 billion, and it raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance to $10.25 - $10.65. This growth was driven by acquisitions and strong performance across both Freight and Transit segments, positioning Wabtec for continued profitable growth.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Posts Strong Q2 Results, Raises Outlook
feed.summary: TE Connectivity reported strong Q2 2026 results with 15% sales growth and record adjusted EPS, exceeding guidance due to demand in AI data centers, next-generation transportation, and electric grid modernization. The company raised its quarterly dividend by 10% and expects continued double-digit growth in Q3. An AI analyst rates TEL stock as "Outperform" due to its financial quality and earnings outlook, despite tempered technical momentum and valuation.

feed.title: Pearson (PSO) confirms 607,930,912 ordinary shares in issue and voting rights
feed.summary: Pearson plc has announced that as of April 21, 2026, it has 607,930,912 ordinary shares of 25p each admitted to trading, with each share carrying one voting right. The company holds no Treasury shares, making this figure the total voting power for shareholders. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification obligations under the UK Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules because it serves as the denominator for calculating percentage holdings.

feed.title: MGM exits Ohio Racino as VICI enters a lease with the new operator (MGM:NYSE)
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has completed the sale of MGM Northfield Park operations to Clairvest Group for $546 million. This divestiture is considered non-strategic by MGM's CFO. Subsequently, VICI Properties will enter into a new triple-net lease agreement with the acquiring private equity funds for the real estate.

feed.title: Delta, LATAM launch A320 component repair alliance
feed.summary: Delta TechOps and LATAM Airlines Brasil have formed an A320 component repair collaboration to support Delta's fleet and meet third-party demand. This partnership strengthens Delta's global maintenance network and leverages LATAM's MRO facility in Brazil for increased repair capacity and streamlined services. The agreement is built on a strong existing technical relationship and aims to maintain high-quality MRO capabilities for the growing A320 family aircraft market.

feed.title: Boston Scientific announces results for first quarter 2026
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net sales reaching $5.203 billion, an 11.6% increase on a reported basis and 9.4% operationally and organically. The company achieved GAAP diluted EPS of $0.90 and adjusted EPS of $0.80, exceeding its guidance expectations. Key highlights included positive clinical trial results for its WATCHMAN FLX™ and EKOS™ systems, regulatory approvals in China and the U.S., and the acquisition of Valencia Technologies Corporation.

feed.title: $5.2B quarter as Boston Scientific adds FDA clearance, China nod
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) reported strong Q1 2026 results with net sales reaching $5.203 billion, an 11.6% increase, and adjusted EPS of $0.80. The company highlighted broad segment and regional growth, positive clinical trial outcomes, and key regulatory approvals in China and the U.S. for its medical devices. Despite the positive financial performance, the stock experienced a 5.90% decline, wiping out approximately $5.55 billion from its valuation, indicating a negative market reaction potentially due to broader sector pressure or growth normalization.

feed.title: Boston Scientific announces results for first quarter 2026
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with net sales of $5.203 billion, an 11.6% reported increase and 9.4% operational and organic growth year-over-year. The company's GAAP net income attributable to common stockholders reached $1.341 billion or $0.90 per share, with adjusted EPS at $0.80. Boston Scientific also updated its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting 7.0% to 8.5% reported net sales growth and adjusted EPS of $3.34 to $3.41, reflecting continued confidence in its strategy and pipeline.

feed.title: Earnings millions at JPMorgan versus earning millions at Morgan Stanley. An observation
feed.summary: This article analyzes the compensation structures for managing directors at JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley in London, noting an important discrepancy despite similar average earnings and bonuses. While both firms pay their material risk takers around £1.5 million on average, Morgan Stanley tends to concentrate its higher (€3M+) earners more densely than JPMorgan, which spreads its million-euro packages more widely among lower-earning millionaires. This suggests that Morgan Stanley might be preferable for aspiring very high earners, while JPMorgan offers more opportunities for those aiming for a general millionaire status.

feed.title: Gartner Forecasts Worldwide IT Spending to Grow 13.5% in 2026, Totaling $6.31 Trillion
feed.summary: Gartner projects global IT spending to reach $6.31 trillion in 2026, a 13.5% increase from 2025, primarily driven by strong investment in AI infrastructure and advanced memory. Data center systems are expected to see the highest growth at 55.8%, while IT services will account for the largest overall spending, surpassing $1.87 billion. The forecast highlights a multi-speed IT market, with AI-centric segments significantly outperforming traditional categories due to robust demand and price increases in components like high-bandwidth memory.

feed.title: Bank of America, one of Cincinnati’s largest banks, expanding by opening a suburban branch
feed.summary: Bank of America is expanding its presence in the Cincinnati metropolitan area by opening a new branch in Colerain Township. This new location will add to the 18 existing branches Bank of America already operates in Greater Cincinnati, continuing its expansion efforts since entering the market seven years ago. The move highlights the bank's strategy of growing its physical footprint in the region.

feed.title: SageGuard Financial Group LLC Buys New Holdings in Amcor PLC $AMCR
feed.summary: SageGuard Financial Group LLC has acquired a new stake of 43,903 shares, valued at approximately $366,000, in Amcor PLC during the fourth quarter. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors increasing their positions in Amcor, which now holds about 45.14% institutional ownership. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $50.89.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Projected to Post Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Humana (NYSE:HUM) is projected to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $10.00 and revenue of $39.08 billion. The company reported better-than-expected earnings in the previous quarter and increased revenue by 11.3% year-over-year. Humana also recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.885 per share, and an insider increased their stake in the company.

feed.title: Northern Financial Advisors Inc Sells 1,256 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Northern Financial Advisors Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) by 60.2%, selling 1,256 shares in Q4, and now holds 831 shares valued at $717,000. Despite this, institutional ownership remains high at 68.48%, with several other major funds increasing their positions. Costco has raised its quarterly dividend by 13% to $1.47, and analysts rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $1,045.97, reflecting positive sentiment driven by expansion plans and digital sales growth.

feed.title: Penobscot Investment Management Company Inc. Sells 13,764 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Penobscot Investment Management Company Inc. reduced its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. by 31.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 13,764 shares and retaining 30,186 shares valued at $2.53 million. This comes as Church & Dwight announced beating quarterly EPS estimates, setting FY2026 guidance, and increasing its quarterly dividend. The stock currently has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $101.59.

feed.title: Novem Group Acquires Shares of 8,298 PulteGroup, Inc. $PHM
feed.summary: Novem Group recently acquired 8,298 shares of PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE:PHM) in the fourth quarter, valuing their new stake at approximately $973,000. Institutional investors now own about 89.90% of PulteGroup, while insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently. Analysts currently rate PulteGroup as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $138.79.
